name: Divio Technologies AB (publ)
summary: Divio Technologies AB (publ) develops cloud management software for enterprises and developers. The company offers Divio Cloud Management Platform, a platform-as-a-service that provides cloud hosting, deployment, and development services to enterprises in reducing dependencies on employees, as well as cloud vendors. It also offers django CMS, an open-source CMS platform. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
